title: juncus campestris var. nivalis
intro: Juncus campestris var. nivalis, also known as the alpine rush or mountain rush, is a variety of the juncus campestris plant that thrives in high-altitude, cold environments. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Juncus campestris var. nivalis include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and improve breathing, making it a valuable herb for individuals suffering from respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Juncus campestris var. nivalis typically involve drying and processing the roots, leaves, and stems, which can be consumed as tea, taken as a capsule, or applied topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
